terminal.errorMessage: The server has found a system error with message:
terminal.foreignSignal: ‘for3ign s1gnal detected, unauthorised user is int3rcepting’.

nameInput.prompt: Enter your secret passcode to proceed:

intruder.reload: Reload the page to try again.

protocol.confidential: WARNING: THIS DOCUMENT IS CONFIDENTIAL. DO NOT SHARE THIS INFORMATION.
protocol.intro2:
Strange events reported in a city named Gallarate.
- Sightings of unidentified objects
- Anomalous radio interceptions
protocol.meeting: An extraordinary meeting has been called where your presence is required.
protocol.taskIntro1: You must complete a secret task without anyone noticing.
protocol.taskIntro2: They might discover your identity and cost you 1 point.
protocol.bonus: BONUS TASK: Present any conspiracy theory to earn 5 points.
protocol.alert: Keep your eyes open: many strange things will happen.
protocol.report: Discover the real identity of your companions and file a report using the button below to earn 3 points.
protocol.locationReveal: The final location will be revealed on the day of the event.
protocol.reload: Reload this page to discover it and arrive on time.
protocol.absence: Your absence will be considered highly suspicious.

presentation.subject: Presentation
presentation.body:
Presentation completed. Over.
Please find it attached. Over.

promotion.title: TITLE: INTERPRETER
promotion.task2: - Observe any unusual behavior — even small oddities may be important.
promotion.task3: - Translate everything spoken in the room. Do not miss a word; every detail could contain crucial clues.
promotion.pay: Remuneration: 2 points + performance bonus. High client satisfaction earns 5 extra points.

interview.ineligibleResult: Thank you for submitting your application. After careful examination, the Official Department of Interrecognized Galactic Languages has determined that your profile does not meet the minimum standards required for this mission.
interview.pendingResult: Application received. Your request has been transmitted under the highest level of secrecy to the Official Department of Interrecognized Galactic Languages and is currently under evaluation. Return to this page to check its progress. If a guest with linguistic impedements requires your services, the assignment will appear here.
interview.negativeResult: WARNING: Your application has been deemed highly suspicious by the Official Department of Interrecognized Galactic Languages. For linguistic security reasons, your interpretation services have not been authorized for this event.
interview.positiveResult1: Application approved. You have been officially selected as interpreter by the following linguistically limited client:
interview.positiveResult2: The Official Department of Interrecognized Galactic Languages places great importance on discretion, efficiency, and secrecy among its personnel, as well as the delivery of high-quality services. Maximum interlinguistic communication standards are expected: the client will assign you a rating at the end of the event and you may earn up to 3 extra points.

questions.question: How did you learn English?
answers: I had English classes when I was in school
I lived overseas so I had to master English to survive

I had close encounters of the third kind and requested some artificial intelligence to be installed as a microchip in my brain to instantly learn 308 languages including dialects and acquire interstellar knowledge that will allow me to conquer the world and destroy the planet

questions.question: Mmh... interesting... and when did that happen?
answers: That moment cannot be represented on a human calendar as it occurred during a temporary collapse of the temporal grid monitored by the Intergalactic Linguistic Council

questions.question: Curious... nice... and how confident are you in covering this position?
answers: Confidence is a a biological coping mechanism and human emotional construct designed to compensate for uncertainty, which is a feeling I do not experience as I function best on statistical inevitability
